name: TDS Calculator
description: Estimate tax deducted at source for payments.

example.explanation: Tax deducted at source on ₹50,000 at 10% rate is ₹5,000, leaving ₹45,000.

faqs.question: What is TDS?
faqs.answer: Tax Deducted at Source is a means of collecting tax on income at the point it is generated.

faqs.question: Can I claim it back?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can claim TDS refunds when filing your income tax return if excess tax is deducted.

faqs.question: What are common TDS rates?
faqs.answer: Common TDS rates are 10%, 20%, and 30% depending on the transaction type and income.
